title: Dense Roasted Australian Flour Bake
description: A nostalgic Australian dish featuring strong wholemeal flour, this dense roasted bake is perfect for a hearty breakfast or snack. It is nut-free-friendly and made with wholesome ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the wholemeal flour, rolled oats, brown sugar, dried fruit, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the bake is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, sliced into squares or rectangles.
